title: Spotify Recommender
tagline: A music recommender that shows why each track made the cut
summary: I wanted recommendations that could start with a song or a mood and still make sense. Signal ranks tracks across nine audio features, explains the closest matches, and includes a demo that works without a Spotify account.
outcome: The rebuilt project has a live 72-track browser demo, the original Python ranking engine, an offline evaluator, and nine tests covering the recommendation path.
